name: M&m Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, eggs, oil, and water in a large bowl.
2. Add the M&Ms and any additional ingredients (nuts or coconut) to the mixture.
3. Spread the batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 to 8 minutes, being careful not to overbake.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
